details.test: Task 1: Add cheapest OEM oil filter under $25 for 2016 Accord (qty 2)
Task 2: Choose spark plugs with longer warranty for 2015 Camry and add 4
Task 3: Build timing belt, water pump, tensioner kit for 2012 Civic under $300
Task 4: Save performance air intake kit for 2018 Mustang with rating 4.5+, < $400, free shipping
Task 5: Start guest checkout with fastest-delivery diesel injector set for 2016 Ram 2500 6.7L
Task 6: Select mid-priced serpentine belt via VIN between $30 and $60 with standard shipping
Task 7: Choose cheaper of Victor Reinz vs Fel-Pro full gasket set for 2008 BMW 328i and add after viewing docs
Task 8: In-store pickup thermostat for 2010 Silverado 5.3L with 4+ stars, 10+ reviews, < $60
Task 9: Submit Request a Part form for rare engine component
